decision.summary: Hold the open weekly 66k dip position and skip any new BTC entry this cycle.
decision.rationale: Beecthor’s latest transcript and recent summaries keep the thesis bearish after a corrective rebound, and Binance at 66786.01 still fits that view, but the existing weekly `will-bitcoin-dip-to-66k-march-30-april-5` Yes position is only at 86.0%, so it is not yet in the 90-95% take-profit zone and does not need management. For new entries, the daily nearest bearish strike already resolved too aggressively above the hard cap, the next daily downside strike is weakly priced, and the second weekly step-down has already been rejected by nearest-strike-first logic while the 66k weekly is the active first-step position. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
